morefirework.title: More Firework
morefirework.description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that turns fireworks into a deep combat system with ore-ingot rockets, elemental effects, and devastating combos.

RimWorldDownloader.title: RimWorld Downloader
RimWorldDownloader.description: Download RimWorld mods directly from Steam Workshop servers without requiring a local Steam client or authentication.

edu-virus.title: Edu-Virus
edu-virus.description: Educational malware/C2 system demo for classroom assignments. Demonstrates trojan architecture with pastebin-based command & control.

ai-education-pptx.title: AI Education PPTX
ai-education-pptx.description: Automated PowerPoint presentation builder exploring how AI is changing high school education. Generates polished, designed slides from Python.

biology-pptx.title: Biology PPTX
biology-pptx.description: A beautifully designed PowerPoint presentation on photosynthesis, generated entirely from Python code with a green nature palette.

english-slang-pptx.title: English Slang PPTX
english-slang-pptx.description: JavaScript-powered slide deck on the evolution of English slang in the digital age. Explores how internet culture reshapes language.

epic-claimer.title: Epic Games Claimer
epic-claimer.description: An autonomous Python script that checks for free weekly promotions on the Epic Games Store, claims them automatically, and sends Discord notifications.

hermes-mcp-whatsapp.title: Hermes MCP WhatsApp
hermes-mcp-whatsapp.description: MCP server that lets AI assistants initiate outbound WhatsApp voice calls through a Pipecat bot. Bridge between LLMs and phone calls.

counting-sort.title: Counting Sort
counting-sort.description: Counting sort algorithm implementations in C++ and Python — a linear time sorting algorithm for competitive programming.

vLoon-jpg.title: vLoon GitHub Profile
vLoon-jpg.description: My GitHub profile README — a summary of who I am, what I build, and where to find me. Student, modder, automation enthusiast.
